info.title: Knowledge Base - Upload Document (Tabular)
info.description: API for managing documents and tables in the Knowledge Base.

post.description: Uploads new table data to the Knowledge Base. This endpoint supports completely custom fields in the table data, including various data types such as string, number, array, or object.

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: If set to true, the existing table with the same name will be overwritten.

name.description: A unique name identifying the table.

searchableFields.description: An array of fields within each item that can be searched. Only supports fields of type string, number, or boolean. Does not support fields of type array or object.

metadataFields.description: An array of fields within each item that are considered metadata for additional context. You can filter by metadata fields. This field is optional. [Learn more](https://developer.voiceflow.com/docs/filter-with-metadata)

items.description: An array of items to be included in the table. Each item can have completely custom fields of various types including string, number, array, or object.

items.name: Ultimate Glow Kit
items.description: A complete kit for achieving the ultimate skin glow, including serum, moisturizer, and face mask.

items.name: Hydration Sensation Kit
items.description: The ultimate hydration kit, including a water-based serum, hydrating cream, and a deep moisture mask.

400.description: Bad Request - The request was invalid. This can occur due to various reasons such as poorly formatted request body, missing required fields, invalid data types in searchable fields, or metadata field size exceeding the limit.

error.details: The request body is poorly formatted. Please ensure the request follows the correct JSON structure and includes all required fields.
The request body is missing required fields. Please ensure all required fields are included.
Complex types are not allowed in searchable fields. Please use a supported data type.
The request metadata field must be less than 10 KB.

403.description: Forbidden - The request was understood, but it has been refused or access is not allowed. This can occur if the number of rows in the uploaded table exceeds the limit for your current plan.

error.details: The number of rows in the uploaded table exceeds the limit for your current plan. Please upgrade your plan to upload tables with more rows.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - The request was well-formed but was unable to be followed due to semantic errors. This can occur if the metadata format is invalid.

error.details: The metadata format is invalid. Please ensure the metadata adheres to the required schema.

DialogManagerAPIKey.name: Authorization
DialogManagerAPIKey.description:
All requests made to any Knowledge Base APIs must be validated with a Dialog Manager API Key.
To obtain a Dialog Manager API key, go to the Integration tab on the project you uploaded data sources to and click the "Copy API key" button.
